ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password for the user */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "userStatus" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active/inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "locked_until" TEXT /* Timestamp until which the account is locked due to multiple failed login attempts */,
  "is_2fa_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store role-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role assignment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting a password reset */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token generated for the password reset request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password reset request was made */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password reset token expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the password reset request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the password reset request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the login attempt was made */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the login attempt was made */,
  "lockout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for account lockout (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persistent_sessions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each persistent session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the session */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was last active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the session was initiated */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persistent_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oauth_access_tokens" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the access token */,
  "token" TEXT /* Access token */,
  "expires_in" INTEGER /* Number of seconds until the token expires */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the access token */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access token was requested */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the access token was requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oauth_access_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oauth_refresh_tokens" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refresh token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the refresh token */,
  "token" TEXT /* Refresh token */,
  "expires_in" INTEGER /* Number of seconds until the token expires */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the refresh token */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the refresh token was requested */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the refresh token was requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oauth_refresh_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_verifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email verification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the email verification */,
  "token" TEXT /* Verification token */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the email has been verified */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the email verification token expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the verification request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the verification request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_verifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone verification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the phone verification */,
  "token" TEXT /* Verification token */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the phone has been verified */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the phone verification token expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the verification request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the verification request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "two_factor_auth" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each two-factor authentication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the two-factor authentication */,
  "secret" TEXT /* Secret key */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user has completed two-factor authentication */,
  "last_2fa_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful two-factor authentication */,
  "2fa_method" TEXT /* Method used for two-factor authentication (e.g., SMS, email, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_two_factor_auth_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the activity was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., IP address, user agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the setting */,
  "setting" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the integration */,
  "integration" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was last updated */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the audit log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
